hero.title: Engineering, design, and construction delivered with one accountable team
hero.subtitle: Hoxha Engineering plans, engineers, and builds residential, public, and commercial projects with clear timelines, technical discipline, and on-site quality control.

stats.title: 33 Years Of Undefeated Success
stats.description: Since 1992, we've been delivering exceptional construction services with unwavering dedication to quality and innovation. Our extensive experience ensures that every project is completed to the highest standards.

descriptions.residential: We design and construct high-quality residential buildings that blend functionality with aesthetic appeal, creating perfect living spaces for families.
descriptions.individual: Our individual building projects are tailored to meet specific client needs, with customized designs that reflect personal style and requirements.
descriptions.collective: We specialize in creating collective residential complexes that foster community while providing modern, comfortable living spaces for multiple families.
descriptions.social: Our social building projects are designed to serve community needs, creating spaces that are accessible, functional, and conducive to social interaction.
descriptions.public: We deliver public infrastructure projects that enhance urban environments, with a focus on durability, accessibility, and public service.
descriptions.architectural: Our architectural design services combine creativity with technical expertise to produce innovative and functional building designs that exceed client expectations.

cta.discussDescription: Ready to start your construction project? Contact us today for a consultation and let our experts bring your vision to life.
cta.readyToWorkDescription: Contact our team today to discuss your construction project and experience the Hoxha Engineering difference.

about.title: Committed To Keep People Healthy & Safe
about.description: At Hoxha Engineering, we prioritize sustainability and safety in every project we undertake. Our commitment to environmentally responsible construction practices ensures that our buildings not only stand the test of time but also contribute positively to the communities they serve.
about.practicesDescription: Our construction methodologies adhere to the highest industry standards, ensuring exceptional quality and durability in every project we complete.

founders.title: About Founders
founders.description: We are a leading local company in North Macedonia with a rich history of excellence in construction and engineering. Our leadership team brings decades of experience and a passion for innovation.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Our team is available to answer any questions you may have about our services, projects, or to discuss your construction needs.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.subtitle: Get in touch with us for your projects
contactPage.contactFormIntro: We'd love to hear from you. Please fill out the form below or contact us directly using the information provided.
contactPage.name: Name
contactPage.subject: Subject

footer.buildingExcellence: Building excellence through innovation and dedication since 1992.

aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.subtitle: Meet our team of experts
aboutPage.storyDescription: Hoxha Engineering is a company specialized in construction and engineering with a rich history dating back to 1992. We have built our reputation through dedication to quality and innovation.
aboutPage.missionDescription: Our mission is to provide exceptional construction services that exceed client expectations and contribute to community development.
aboutPage.valuesDescription: We operate with integrity, transparency, and commitment to quality in every project we undertake.
aboutPage.teamDescription: Our team consists of qualified professionals with years of experience in the construction industry.
aboutPage.storyP1: We are a leading local company in North Macedonia with over 33 years of experience in the construction industry. Since 1992, Hoxha Engineering has been building excellence through innovation and dedication.
aboutPage.storyP2: Our mission is to deliver high-quality construction services while maintaining the highest standards of safety and sustainability.
aboutPage.storyP3: Throughout our journey, we have consistently embraced innovation, invested in our team's development, and prioritized client satisfaction. Our commitment to excellence has established us as a trusted partner for construction projects of all scales across North Macedonia.
aboutPage.valuesIntro: Our core values define who we are and guide our approach to every project we undertake.
aboutPage.foundersIntro: Our company is led by experienced professionals dedicated to excellence in construction and engineering.
aboutPage.achievementsIntro: Over three decades of success in the construction industry

values.excellenceDesc: We are committed to delivering the highest quality in every aspect of our work, from materials to craftsmanship.
values.deadlinesDesc: We understand the importance of timely delivery and are dedicated to completing projects within the agreed timeframe.
values.innovationDesc: We continuously seek innovative approaches and solutions to enhance the quality and efficiency of our construction projects.
values.environmentDesc: We prioritize sustainable construction practices and materials to minimize environmental impact and create greener buildings.
values.satisfactionDesc: We place our clients at the center of everything we do, ensuring their needs are met and expectations are exceeded.
values.teamDesc: We invest in the continuous growth and development of our team, fostering a culture of excellence and collaboration.

servicesPage.title: Our Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Complete construction and engineering services
servicesPage.constructionDescription: We provide complete construction services for residential and commercial projects.
servicesPage.engineeringDescription: Our engineering expertise ensures that your projects are safe and sustainable.
servicesPage.projectManagementDescription: We manage your projects from start to finish.
servicesPage.consultationDescription: We provide professional consultation for all aspects of construction.
servicesPage.discussDescription: Ready to start your construction project? Contact us today for a consultation and let our experts bring your vision to life.

teamBios.selman: Specialising in sustainable residential and mixed-use developments for more than 15 years.
teamBios.sevdail: Expert in reinforced-concrete and steel structures with deep on-site experience.
teamBios.engineer: Ensuring every detail on site meets the highest quality and safety standards.

staff.title: Our Staff
staff.intro: Meet the architects, engineers, and project professionals who turn careful planning into dependable buildings.
staff.projectsIntro: A selection of projects developed and delivered as part of the Hoxha Engineering team.
staff.notFoundDescription: The requested professional profile is not available.
